channel.title: 战况追踪 — Global Conflict Monitor
channel.description: 实时追踪全球主要冲突态势，多源聚合情报

item.title: [俄乌战争] UKRAINE → nan : Fight with artillery and tanks (Dnipro, Ukraine (general), Ukraine)
item.description: GDELT Event: Fight with artillery and tanks. Actors: UKRAINE / nan. Location: Dnipro, Ukraine (general), Ukraine. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 8 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] LEBANON → nan : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Tel Aviv, Tel Aviv, Israel)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: LEBANON / nan. Location: Tel Aviv, Tel Aviv, Israel. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 8 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] ISRAELI → BEIRUT : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Sheikh Jarrah, Yerushalayim, Israel)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: ISRAELI / BEIRUT. Location: Sheikh Jarrah, Yerushalayim, Israel. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 7 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] PROTESTER → PALESTINE : Protest violently, riot (Israel)
item.description: GDELT Event: Protest violently, riot. Actors: PROTESTER / PALESTINE. Location: Israel. Goldstein Scale: -7.5. Mentioned in 6 sources.

item.title: [俄乌战争] HIMACHAL PRADESH → TOURIST : Physically assault, not specified below (Ukraine)
item.description: GDELT Event: Physically assault, not specified below. Actors: HIMACHAL PRADESH / TOURIST. Location: Ukraine. Goldstein Scale: -9.5. Mentioned in 8 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Fight with artillery and tanks. Actors: UKRAINIAN / MILITARY. Location: Black Sea, Oceans (general), Oceans. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 2 sources.

item.title: [美伊对峙] CIVILIAN → MILITANT : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Miran Shah, Punjab, Pakistan)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: CIVILIAN / MILITANT. Location: Miran Shah, Punjab, Pakistan. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 10 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Engage in popular protest, not specified below. Actors: FARS NEWS / FOREIGN MINIST. Location: Mashhad, (IR30), Iran. Goldstein Scale: -6.5. Mentioned in 6 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Fight with small arms and light weapons. Actors: UNITED STATES / ODESSA. Location: Texas, United States. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 10 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Arrest, detain, or charge with legal action. Actors: SENATE / nan. Location: Russia. Goldstein Scale: -5.0. Mentioned in 2 sources.
